message:
Round 9: GPA + encode cache (0.8% gain)

Results: 985ms → 977ms (-0.8% improvement)
Still 1.62x slower than rs-bpe (605ms)

Findings:
- Benchmark already correct (init outside loop)
- Encode cache already implemented (minimal gain)
- Round 8 profiling hypothesis was wrong

File split: tokenizer.zig (514 → 464 lines)
- Created tokenizer_cache.zig (63 lines)
- Removed agent mentions from code comments

Next: Profile-driven optimization or accept current performance
